title: TargetCapability
description: A connector's explicit capability declaration. Unsupported policy mappings must be reported rather than silently approximated.

connector_id.description: Stable identifier for the connector implementation.

idempotent.description: Whether retrying the same execution identity is safe and returns the prior result.

supports_approval.description: Whether the connector can enforce exact-action approval before execution.

supports_precondition.description: Whether the connector can enforce target-state preconditions.

supports_reconciliation.description: Whether the connector can reconcile execution against native target evidence.

supports_compensation.description: Whether the connector exposes an explicit compensation operation.

policy_mapping_fidelity.description: How faithfully TealTiger policy semantics map to the target's native controls.

contractVersion.description: Semantic contract version. This package supports major version 1 and emits 1.0.0.

reversibilityClass.description: Highest reversibility class the connector can safely represent for the declared operation surface.
